卧槽，这更新速度，强啊👍"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1630818921,"group_id":"6968712089066015774","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"学生党，没有常识文笔垃圾，容易太监忘事","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2ENP9cvM7OF2iuVQHcer5GY4W+3AcQAYwa7GurBPwEg","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/c2cfebc85bf04392843c36d4229be04f~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776618807&x-signature=xnuu2CvbDFX%2Fed3kr0uCIr2i%2Bks%3D","user_id":"3007918448068622","user_name":"一日清闲一日仙"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3007918448068622","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6968712089066015774","book_info":{"abstract":"“白手起家，咱就大炼钢铁！
敌人太强，咱就枪炮升级！
三藩之乱近在眼前，那就三方乱战，看谁能笑到最后。殖民盛宴以过中场，那就强势出击，让列强无路可走。无论前路如何艰险，敌人如何强大，骄傲的穿越者都将以一场场荡气回肠的巅峰对决，书写不一样的历史。正所谓：科技独步撑天下，血染征袍卫家乡，金融乱战震寰宇，华夏盛世国无疆。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-images/c992988d044a9168b5cdeddcbc280486","author":"暮看云","author_id":"","book_id":"6968712089066015774","book_name":"乱清","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#201810","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3989人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":503,"name":"清朝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=503&name=清朝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":522,"name":"打脸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=522&name=打脸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"6968782855719617054","read_count":"3989","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2288244"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.4","serial_count":"1104","tags":"历史古代,历史,穿越,清朝,打脸","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-images/1a9e75499f8d69b5674a9c9dc510d735~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779252715&x-signature=5o%2Folgf7t%2FB%2BfG2GlAMjf9aavKE%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"4.8095736e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321125155248C8C80B81D5D77F027"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读13小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":13,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_
